title: SuperHeroes: Overcrise
description: fight against evil wearing a superhero of your choice!
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Superheroes_Overcrise/BH_SO_Header.webp)
![About](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Superheroes_Overcrise/BH_SO_About.webp)
Face the bad guys with your superhero of your choice! and teach them a good lesson!

In this modpack you can become a fantastic hero to sell your own city or choose the alternative path! Or the path of wickedness! As you may have already understood, you can choose which side to be on!, on the side of the bad guys or the good guys!

[Click here to get 25% off your first month on your Minecraft server purchase!](https://bisecthosting.com/PROFAKE)
![get 25% off your first month on your Minecraft server purchase!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Superheroes_Overcrise/BH_SO_Promo.webp)
